'''鈭歷-g-n-th''' ('''kavagnethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:madder|madder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-n-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:madder|madder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-g-n-th
|-
! Lemma
| kavagnethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivagnethoko|thivagnethoko]] || [[word:jivagnethoko|jivagnethoko]] || [[word:shivagnethoko|shivagnethoko]] || [[word:kivagnethoko|kivagnethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvagnethoko|thuthuvagnethoko]] || [[word:jujuvagnethoko|jujuvagnethoko]] || [[word:shushuvagnethoko|shushuvagnethoko]] || [[word:kukuvagnethoko|kukuvagnethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvagnethoko|thuvagnethoko]] || [[word:juvagnethoko|juvagnethoko]] || [[word:shuvagnethoko|shuvagnethoko]] || [[word:kuvagnethoko|kuvagnethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvagnethoko|thuvagnethoko]] || [[word:juvagnethoko|juvagnethoko]] || [[word:shuvagnethoko|shuvagnethoko]] || [[word:kuvagnethoko|kuvagnethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevagnethoko|thevagnethoko]] || [[word:jevagnethoko|jevagnethoko]] || [[word:shevagnethoko|shevagnethoko]] || [[word:kevagnethoko|kevagnethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovagnethoko|thothovagnethoko]] || [[word:jojovagnethoko|jojovagnethoko]] || [[word:shoshovagnethoko|shoshovagnethoko]] || [[word:kokovagnethoko|kokovagnethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovagnethoko|thovagnethoko]] || [[word:jovagnethoko|jovagnethoko]] || [[word:shovagnethoko|shovagnethoko]] || [[word:kovagnethoko|kovagnethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovagnethoko|thovagnethoko]] || [[word:jovagnethoko|jovagnethoko]] || [[word:shovagnethoko|shovagnethoko]] || [[word:kovagnethoko|kovagnethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vagnethoko|th忙vagnethoko]] || [[word:j忙vagnethoko|j忙vagnethoko]] || [[word:sh忙vagnethoko|sh忙vagnethoko]] || [[word:k忙vagnethoko|k忙vagnethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavagnethoko|thathavagnethoko]] || [[word:jajavagnethoko|jajavagnethoko]] || [[word:shashavagnethoko|shashavagnethoko]] || [[word:kakavagnethoko|kakavagnethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavagnethoko|thavagnethoko]] || [[word:javagnethoko|javagnethoko]] || [[word:shavagnethoko|shavagnethoko]] || [[word:kavagnethoko|kavagnethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavagnethoko|thavagnethoko]] || [[word:javagnethoko|javagnethoko]] || [[word:shavagnethoko|shavagnethoko]] || [[word:kavagnethoko|kavagnethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavagnethithi|shavagnethithi]] || [[word:shavagnethiji|shavagnethiji]] || [[word:shavagnethishi|shavagnethishi]] || [[word:shavagnethiki|shavagnethiki]]
